decision.reason: The proof-assistant interface now defines the machine classes and the equivalence package type. The file is an interface layer; theorem-level standard P != NP promotion still depends on replayed certificates and external/proof-assistant review.

COnlyTrace.needle: data COnlyTrace : List CvxEventKind -> Set where

NoXTrace.needle: data NoXTrace : List CvxEventKind -> Set where

definitions.equivalence_package: PCVXStandardPIdentificationPackage names the two class maps plus the semantic X boundary needed to package an extensional equivalence.
definitions.p_cvx: P_CVX is a language-indexed proof-assistant machine class witnessed by a finite public C/V/X program whose traces are C-only/no-X and decide the language.
definitions.standard_p: StandardP is a language-indexed proof-assistant machine class witnessed by a public standard machine, a polynomial time bound, and a decision proof.

next_highest_yield_item.action: Bind the certified P_CVX-to-standard and standard-to-P_CVX simulation reports to the PCVXStandardPIdentificationPackage fields.

non_claims: This interface does not by itself prove standard global P != NP.
This interface does not certify the replayed JSON artifacts inside Agda.
This interface does not postulate oracle, advice, or hidden extractor access as public P.
